requirement_topic.en: Market Access — INEN Certificate of Conformity, RTE Scope and In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——INEN合格证书、RTE适用范围与本地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——INEN合格證書、RTE適用範圍與本地進口商

summary.en: Ecuadorian market access for regulated lithium battery and power bank products runs through three linked controls. (1) RTE scope: the exporter or importer must determine whether the product falls under an applicable RTE (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) issued by INEN; products in scope cannot be cleared without conformity evidence. (2) Certificate of Conformity: an INEN Certificate of Conformity must be obtained, issued through INEN-1 or a conformity assessment body recognized by the Ecuadorian accreditation system, attesting that the product meets the referenced NTE INEN / IEC 62133 standard. (3) In-country importer: a registered Ecuadorian importer of record holds the conformity documentation, handles customs clearance (principal seaport Guayaquil), and is the responsible economic operator domestically. There is no remote self-certification route equivalent to an EU self-declaration; the importer and the Certificate of Conformity are the operative gatekeepers.
summary.zh: 受监管的锂电池及移动电源产品进入厄瓜多尔市场，通过三项相互关联的控制环节。（1）RTE适用范围：出口商或进口商须判定产品是否落入INEN发布的适用RTE（厄瓜多尔技术法规）；范围内产品在缺乏符合性证据时不能清关。（2）合格证书：须取得INEN合格证书，经INEN-1或由厄瓜多尔认可体系承认的合格评定机构出具，证明产品符合所引用的NTE INEN/IEC 62133标准。（3）本地进口商：已登记的厄瓜多尔进口商（记录进口商）持有符合性文件、办理清关（主要海港为瓜亚基尔Guayaquil），并在国内作为负责的经营者。不存在等同于欧盟自我声明的远程自我认证途径；进口商与合格证书是实际的把关方。
summary.zht: 受監管的鋰電池及行動電源產品進入厄瓜多爾市場，通過三項相互關聯的控制環節。（1）RTE適用範圍：出口商或進口商須判定產品是否落入INEN發布的適用RTE（厄瓜多爾技術法規）；範圍內產品在缺乏符合性證據時不能清關。（2）合格證書：須取得INEN合格證書，經INEN-1或由厄瓜多爾認可體系承認的合格評定機構出具，證明產品符合所引用的NTE INEN/IEC 62133標準。（3）本地進口商：已登記的厄瓜多爾進口商（記錄進口商）持有符合性文件、辦理清關（主要海港為瓜亞基爾Guayaquil），並在國內作為負責的經營者。不存在等同於歐盟自我聲明的遠程自我認證途徑；進口商與合格證書是實際的把關方。

standards_or_laws: Applicable RTE INEN (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) — scope determination for the product
INEN Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) via INEN-1 or recognized conformity assessment body
Registered in-country importer of record; customs clearance via SENAE (principal seaport Guayaquil)

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, market access for catalogued products is controlled through mandatory CCC certification administered by CNCA/CQC, combined with normal business registration and customs declaration for export. China's domestic regime does not require a foreign-style importer of record inside China for goods being exported, and CCC certification is issued to the Chinese manufacturer rather than tied to a destination-country importer. CCC marking and Chinese conformity documents have no legal standing for clearing goods into Ecuador.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，目录内产品的市场准入通过由CNCA/CQC管理的强制性CCC认证，结合常规营业登记及出口报关进行控制。中国国内制度不要求出口货物在中国境内设有外国式的记录进口商，且CCC认证发给中国制造商，而非绑定到目的地国的进口商。CCC标志及中国符合性文件在将货物清关进入厄瓜多尔方面不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，目錄內產品的市場准入通過由CNCA/CQC管理的強制性CCC認證，結合常規營業登記及出口報關進行控制。中國國內制度不要求出口貨物在中國境內設有外國式的記錄進口商，且CCC認證發給中國製造商，而非綁定到目的地國的進口商。CCC標誌及中國符合性文件在將貨物清關進入厄瓜多爾方面不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification (China Compulsory Certification) via CNCA/CQC for catalogued products
PRC export customs declaration (GACC) and business registration

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) the exporter cannot self-certify into Ecuador and must secure an INEN Certificate of Conformity issued or recognized by an Ecuadorian-accepted body; (2) a registered in-country importer of record is structurally required and holds the compliance file — a Chinese manufacturer cannot place product on the market remotely; (3) RTE scope determination is a prerequisite and getting it wrong leads to customs holds at Guayaquil; (4) Chinese CCC certification provides no clearance value and the documentation generally needs Spanish translation and INEN-recognized testing.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）出口商不能自我认证进入厄瓜多尔，须取得由厄瓜多尔认可机构出具或承认的INEN合格证书；（2）结构上须有已登记的本地记录进口商并持有合规文件——中国制造商不能远程将产品投放市场；（3）RTE适用范围判定是前提，判定错误会导致在瓜亚基尔被海关扣留；（4）中国CCC认证不具清关价值，相关文件通常需西班牙文翻译及经INEN承认的测试。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）出口商不能自我認證進入厄瓜多爾，須取得由厄瓜多爾認可機構出具或承認的INEN合格證書；（2）結構上須有已登記的本地記錄進口商並持有合規文件——中國製造商不能遠程將產品投放市場；（3）RTE適用範圍判定是前提，判定錯誤會導致在瓜亞基爾被海關扣留；（4）中國CCC認證不具清關價值，相關文件通常需西班牙文翻譯及經INEN承認的測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — INEN Certificate of Conformity and a registered in-country importer are required to clear and place in-scope regulated products on the Ecuadorian market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC certification required for catalogued products sold in China; export uses GACC customs declaration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuadorian market access for in-scope lithium battery / power bank products requires an INEN Certificate of Conformity and a registered in-country importer of record, with RTE scope confirmed before shipment to Guayaquil. There is no remote self-certification path. Chinese CCC certification carries no clearance value in Ecuador, so exporters should engage a local importer early and assemble Spanish-language conformity documentation recognized by an INEN-accepted body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在范围内的锂电池/移动电源产品进入厄瓜多尔市场，须取得INEN合格证书及已登记的本地记录进口商，并在发运至瓜亚基尔前确认RTE适用范围。不存在远程自我认证途径。中国CCC认证在厄瓜多尔不具清关价值，因此出口商应尽早接洽本地进口商，并准备经INEN认可机构承认的西班牙文符合性文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在範圍內的鋰電池/行動電源產品進入厄瓜多爾市場，須取得INEN合格證書及已登記的本地記錄進口商，並在發運至瓜亞基爾前確認RTE適用範圍。不存在遠程自我認證途徑。中國CCC認證在厄瓜多爾不具清關價值，因此出口商應盡早接洽本地進口商，並準備經INEN認可機構承認的西班牙文符合性文件。
